BusinessSection.title: Don׳t just write code. Build businesses
BusinessSection.subtitle: Here you become a product engineer, not just a task executor. Your code directly impacts the revenue and experience of millions of users.

bus01.title: Product Culture
bus01.description: We care about stability, retention, and conversions just as much as clean code quality.

bus02.title: No Micromanagement
bus02.description: You get full ownership of features and direct access to product decision-making.

bus03.title: Grow with us
bus03.description: We grow people just like products: through mentorship, responsibility, and real impact.
